title: Verify JWT Bearer Tokens with FastAPI
summary: Protect one FastAPI route by validating HS256 bearer tokens and exposing claims to the handler.
verification_setup: Install fastapi, uvicorn, httpx, and PyJWT in the active Python environment.
verification_notes: Validated with Python 3.9.6 on macOS using unittest and FastAPI TestClient. Verified behavior covers a valid token, missing authorization headers, malformed authorization headers, blank bearer tokens, malformed JWT strings, invalid signatures, expired tokens, missing exp claims, and unexpected signing methods.
